name: io.github.br0ski777/screenshot-pdf
title: Screenshot & PDF Capture API
description: Capture website screenshots and generate PDFs programmatically. Full page capture, custom viewport (width/height), multiple formats (PNG/JPEG/WebP), and PDF generation (A4/Letter/Legal/Tabloid). Powered by Puppeteer. Use when you need to take a screenshot of a URL, convert a web page to PDF, generate preview thumbnails, or archive pages visually.
